short_name: Tranexamic Acid in Patients With Traumatic Bleeding Based on Dynamic Monitoring of Thromboelastography
title: Tranexamic Acid in Patients With Traumatic Bleeding Based on Dynamic Monitoring of Thromboelastography

skipped_criteria: Trauma ISS score between 16 and 50: ISS score is not an available patient field in the schema.
Receiving a 1 g TXA push within 3 hours of injury with push completed within 10 minutes of arrival: requires temporal/treatment administration logic not expressible in the schema.
Signing the informed consent form: administrative/procedural criterion not expressible in the schema.
Coagulation abnormalities due to co-morbid hematologic or autoimmune diseases: requires prior medical history/lab fields not available in the schema.
Inability to establish venous or intraosseous access: requires a clinical assessment field not available in the schema.
Traumatic cardiac arrest for more than 5 minutes: the schema can flag cardiac_arrest mechanism but cannot encode duration of arrest.
Failure of cardiopulmonary resuscitation: requires a clinical outcome/status field not available in the schema.
Penetrating brain injury: no field distinguishes penetrating brain injury specifically; mechanism field does not have a dedicated penetrating brain injury enum value.
Drowning or hanging: no matching mechanism enum values exist in the schema for drowning or hanging.
